issue_summary: Allow extra information (e.g. Levenshtein threshold) to be stored as (final) fields in the StringMetric instance. This fixes from github. Thanks to Jonathan Baker.
javadoc_before:
/** *

* Find the Fuzzy Score which indicates the similarity score between two * Strings. This method uses the default locale. *

* * @param term a full term that should be matched against, must not be null * @param query the query that will be matched against a term, must not be * null * @return result score * @throws IllegalArgumentException if either String input {@code null} */
javadoc_after:
/** *

* Find the Fuzzy Score which indicates the similarity score between two * Strings. *

* * 
     * score.compare(null, null, null)                                    = IllegalArgumentException
     * score.compare("", "", Locale.ENGLISH)                              = 0
     * score.compare("Workshop", "b", Locale.ENGLISH)                     = 0
     * score.compare("Room", "o", Locale.ENGLISH)                         = 1
     * score.compare("Workshop", "w", Locale.ENGLISH)                     = 1
     * score.compare("Workshop", "ws", Locale.ENGLISH)                    = 2
     * score.compare("Workshop", "wo", Locale.ENGLISH)                    = 4
     * score.compare("Apache Software Foundation", "asf", Locale.ENGLISH) = 3
     *
* * @param term a full term that should be matched against, must not be null * @param query the query that will be matched against a term, must not be * null * @return result score * @throws IllegalArgumentException if either String input {@code null} or * Locale input {@code null} */
